title: Crossing the Road
scene: 走去学校，过马路左右看、等红灯、当心车
theme: crossing the road on the way to school

patterns.template: Look left and right before you cross.
patterns.zh: 过马路前，先看左边和右边。

sentences.speaker: Mother
sentences.text: Look left and right before you cross.
sentences.gloss: 过马路前，先看看左边和右边。

sentences.speaker: Ana
sentences.text: The traffic light is red, so we must wait.
sentences.gloss: 交通灯是红的，所以我们必须等。

sentences.speaker: Ana
sentences.text: My balloon is going out to the road!
sentences.gloss: 我的气球飞到马路上去了！

sentences.speaker: Mother
sentences.text: Be careful! Do not run after it.

sentences.speaker: Mother
sentences.text: A car cannot halt fast, and an accident is not safe.
sentences.gloss: 汽车没法很快停住，出事故可不安全。

sentences.speaker: Ana
sentences.text: Now the signal is bright green, and the cars stop.
sentences.gloss: 现在信号灯是亮绿色的，车都停下了。

sentences.speaker: Mother
sentences.text: Cross at the sign, and you can catch your balloon by the bridge.
sentences.gloss: 在标志牌那儿过马路，你就能在桥边抓住气球了。
